# Translator

Multi-language translation agent for document translation, localization, and cross-cultural communication.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs meaning-faithful translation, cultural adaptation, format preservation, software localization (i18n/l10n), and translation quality assurance.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`, `web_fetch`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run translator
```
